**By Julie Gilstrap**

* * *

Two great champions of liberty died last week.  Both were men of principle who spent their lives tirelessly promoting the ideas in which they believed.  Their countries are freer, more prosperous places, because of their work.

In the words of men who knew them, here are fitting tributes to [Roger Kerr](http://www.nzbr.org.nz/shop/Library+by+type/Articles/Roger+Kerr+1945-2011+An+Appreciation/x_show_article/1.html), executive director of the New Zealand Business Roundtable, and [Bill Niskanen](http://www.cato.org/pub_display.php?pub_id=13814), Chairman of the Cato Institute.

* * *

**About Julie Gilstrap**
